Example_EN: They hope to settle the argument before Friday.
Example_CN: 他们希望周五前解决这场争论。

Example_EN: We took a small boat across the quiet lake.
Example_CN: 我们乘小船渡过安静的湖面。
MemoryTip: boat：比 ship 更小的水上交通工具。

Example_EN: Foreign aid helped rebuild schools after the flood.
Example_CN: 国际援助帮助洪水后重建学校。

Example_EN: Football fans filled the stadium before kick-off.
Example_CN: 开赛前足球迷挤满了体育场。
MemoryTip: fan：扇风的装置；也指狂热支持者。

Example_EN: She prepared breakfast in the kitchen every morning.
Example_CN: 她每天早上在厨房准备早餐。

Example_EN: I brush my teeth twice a day.
Example_CN: 我每天刷牙两次。

Example_EN: Please buy some fresh vegetables for tonight's dinner.
Example_CN: 请买些新鲜蔬菜做今晚的晚餐。

Example_EN: The heavy snow caused a long delay at the airport.
Example_CN: 大雪造成机场长时间延误。

Example_EN: Please wear a helmet for your own safety.
Example_CN: 为了自身安全请戴头盔。

Example_EN: She works as a software engineer in London.
Example_CN: 她在伦敦做软件工程师。
MemoryTip: engine → engineer：造引擎、解决问题的人。

Example_EN: Please keep quiet while others are taking the test.
Example_CN: 其他人考试时请保持安静。

Example_EN: Travel insurance can cover the cost of lost luggage.
Example_CN: 旅行保险可报销丢失行李的费用。

Collocation: hospital nurse;nurse a patient;nurse back to health
Example_EN: The nurse checked the patient's temperature carefully.
Example_CN: 护士仔细检查了病人的体温。

Example_EN: Please divide the class into four small groups.
Example_CN: 请把班级分成四个小组。

Example_EN: What is the length of this swimming pool?
Example_CN: 这座游泳池有多长？

Collocation: under investigation;police investigation;carry out an investigation
Example_EN: The accident is still under investigation.
Example_CN: 这起事故仍在调查中。

Example_EN: A large package arrived for you this morning.
Example_CN: 今天上午有一个大包裹寄给你。
MemoryTip: pack → package：打包好的一包东西。

Example_EN: Let's find somewhere quiet to talk.
Example_CN: 我们找个安静的地方聊聊吧。
MemoryTip: some + where：在某个不具体的地方。

Example_EN: The company plans to expand into new markets.
Example_CN: 公司计划拓展到新市场。

Example_EN: You must commit yourself if you want real progress.
Example_CN: 若想真正进步，你必须全力投入。
MemoryTip: commit：把手放上去答应，也指做出某行为。

Collocation: obvious reason;it is obvious that;pretty obvious
Example_EN: It is obvious that she has prepared carefully.
Example_CN: 显然她做了认真准备。

Example_EN: The cat jumped onto the kitchen table.
Example_CN: 猫跳上了厨房的桌子。

Example_EN: Knowledge can be a powerful weapon against fear.
Example_CN: 知识可以成为对抗恐惧的有力武器。
MemoryTip: weapon：用来攻击或防护的器具。

Example_EN: This task is relatively easy if you practise first.
Example_CN: 如果你先练习，这项任务相对容易。

Collocation: host a party;host country;talk show host
Example_EN: Our school will host a science fair next month.
Example_CN: 我校下月将主办一场科学展览。
MemoryTip: host：招待别人、把控现场的人。

Example_EN: Many birds fly south for the winter.
Example_CN: 许多鸟类飞往南方过冬。

Example_EN: This shopping district is always crowded at weekends.
Example_CN: 这个商业区周末总是很拥挤。
MemoryTip: district：被划出来的一片管辖区。

Example_EN: She has a broad range of interests, from music to science.
Example_CN: 她兴趣广泛，从音乐到科学都有。

Example_EN: Long meetings can tire even the most patient people.
Example_CN: 冗长的会议会让即使最有耐心的人也感到疲惫。
MemoryTip: tire：累；美式也指轮胎（英式 tyre）。

Example_EN: Cherry trees blossom beautifully in spring.
Example_CN: 樱花树在春天开得很美。

Example_EN: Strong team spirit helped them win the match.
Example_CN: 强大的团队精神帮助他们赢得了比赛。
MemoryTip: spirit：看不见却驱动行动的那股劲。

Example_EN: We usually have lunch in the school canteen.
Example_CN: 我们通常在学校食堂吃午饭。

Example_EN: The actual cost was higher than we expected.
Example_CN: 实际费用比我们预期的更高。
MemoryTip: actual：不是想象，而是真实发生的。

Example_EN: The hotel has an outdoor swimming pool.
Example_CN: 酒店有一个室外游泳池。
MemoryTip: pool：一摊水；也可指把资源合到一起。

Example_EN: Doctors are fighting a tough battle against the disease.
Example_CN: 医生们正与这种疾病展开艰难斗争。

Example_EN: Eating together at New Year is an old family tradition.
Example_CN: 新年时家人团聚吃饭是古老的家庭传统。

Collocation: pay in cash;cash payment;out of cash
Example_EN: Do you prefer to pay in cash or by card?
Example_CN: 你更喜欢用现金还是刷卡付款？

Example_EN: I can hardly hear you because of the noise.
Example_CN: 因为太吵，我几乎听不见你说话。

Collocation: win an award;award ceremony;award a prize
Example_EN: She won an award for her science project.
Example_CN: 她因科学项目获得了奖项。
MemoryTip: award：正式把荣誉交到你手里。

Example_EN: The coach asked the team to practise every morning.
Example_CN: 教练要求队员每天早训练。
MemoryTip: coach：训练人的人；也可指大巴。

Example_EN: Students will do a simple experiment in the lab today.
Example_CN: 学生今天将在实验室做一个简单实验。
MemoryTip: experiment：动手试试看会发生什么。

Collocation: take into consideration;under consideration;out of consideration
Example_EN: Please take cost into consideration when you choose.
Example_CN: 选择时请把费用考虑进去。

Example_EN: I heard a strange noise outside my window last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚我听见窗外有奇怪的响声。

Example_EN: Please enter the security code to unlock the phone.
Example_CN: 请输入安全密码以解锁手机。
MemoryTip: code：一串约定好的符号/规则。

Collocation: possibly not;as soon as possibly;possibly because
Example_EN: She will possibly arrive a little later than planned.
Example_CN: 她可能会比计划晚到一点。

Example_EN: Pollution is a serious threat to river wildlife.
Example_CN: 污染对河流野生生物是严重威胁。

Example_EN: He was late because of a traffic accident on the motorway.
Example_CN: 他因高速公路上的交通事故迟到了。
MemoryTip: accident：无意中突然发生的不好之事。

Example_EN: It is impossible to finish this work in one hour.
Example_CN: 一小时内完成这项工作是不可能的。

Example_EN: The shop's revenue rose after the summer sale.
Example_CN: 暑期促销后这家店的收入上升了。

Example_EN: Good teaching enables students to learn independently.
Example_CN: 良好的教学使学生能够独立学习。
MemoryTip: en + able：让人变得有能力去做。

Example_EN: Many children are afraid of the dark at first.
Example_CN: 许多孩子起初害怕黑暗。
MemoryTip: afraid：心里发怵；I'm afraid 也常表委婉否定。

Example_EN: She stays active by walking every morning.
Example_CN: 她通过每天早上散步保持活跃。

Example_EN: From the data, we can conclude that sales are rising.
Example_CN: 根据数据，我们可以断定销售额正在上升。
MemoryTip: con + clude：把讨论收束到结论。

Example_EN: The museum shows objects from many religious traditions.
Example_CN: 博物馆展出来自多种宗教传统的物品。

Example_EN: Early testing can help doctors treat cancer more effectively.
Example_CN: 早期检测能帮助医生更有效地治疗癌症。
MemoryTip: cancer：医学上的严重疾病名称。

Collocation: convince someone of;convince that;hard to convince
Example_EN: I tried to convince him to join the team.
Example_CN: 我试图说服他加入这个团队。
MemoryTip: con + vince：把对方谈到相信你。

Example_EN: Opinions vary from person to person on this issue.
Example_CN: 在这个问题上，意见因人而异。

Example_EN: Students discussed environmental issues in geography class.
Example_CN: 学生们在地理课上讨论了环境问题。

Example_EN: The sun rose behind the mountains this morning.
Example_CN: 今天早上太阳从山后升起。
MemoryTip: sun：天空中发光发热的恒星。

Example_EN: A healthy diet includes fruit, vegetables and water.
Example_CN: 健康饮食包括水果、蔬菜和水。

Example_EN: The wind blew the papers off the desk.
Example_CN: 风把纸从桌上吹走了。
MemoryTip: blow：用气吹动，也指突然一击。

Collocation: turn up the volume;volume of;large volume
Example_EN: Please turn down the volume of the television.
Example_CN: 请把电视音量调低。
MemoryTip: volume：声音有多大，或书的第几卷。

Example_EN: Please share your location so we can find you.
Example_CN: 请分享你的位置，好让我们找到你。

Example_EN: Parents invest a lot of time in their children's education.
Example_CN: 父母在孩子教育上投入大量时间。
MemoryTip: invest：把资源放进去期待回报。

Example_EN: If there are no questions, we will proceed to the next item.
Example_CN: 如果没有问题，我们将继续下一项。

Example_EN: Please wash your hands before lunch.
Example_CN: 午饭前请洗手。

Example_EN: The lead actor signed autographs after the show.
Example_CN: 男主角在演出后签了名。

Example_EN: I'm glad you could come to the meeting today.
Example_CN: 很高兴你今天能来开会。

Example_EN: She used sticky tape to fix the torn page.
Example_CN: 她用胶带修补了撕破的书页。
MemoryTip: tape：细长条，常用来粘或录音。

Example_EN: He loves cities, whereas his sister prefers the countryside.
Example_CN: 他喜欢城市，而他妹妹更喜欢乡村。

Example_EN: Their house is opposite the post office.
Example_CN: 他们的房子在邮局对面。

Example_EN: Children skipped stones across the calm lake.
Example_CN: 孩子们在平静的湖面上打水漂。

Example_EN: Please sum up the main points in one sentence.
Example_CN: 请用一句话概括要点。

Example_EN: The police are investigating a serious murder case.
Example_CN: 警方正在调查一起严重的谋杀案。

Example_EN: Teachers monitor students' progress throughout the year.
Example_CN: 老师全年监控学生的进度。

Example_EN: The young soldier wrote home every week.
Example_CN: 这位年轻士兵每周给家里写信。

Collocation: personal finance;finance a project;ministry of finance
Example_EN: She studied finance at university and works in a bank.
Example_CN: 她大学学金融，现在在银行工作。
MemoryTip: finance：跟钱怎么管、怎么用有关。

Example_EN: I hate waiting in long queues at the station.
Example_CN: 我讨厌在车站排长队等待。

Example_EN: She had a boiled egg and toast for breakfast.
Example_CN: 她早餐吃了煮鸡蛋和吐司。
MemoryTip: egg：壳里装着可吃可孵的东西。

Example_EN: We bought tickets for a classical concert downtown.
Example_CN: 我们买了市中心一场古典音乐会的票。
MemoryTip: concert：多人同台演出的音乐活动。

Example_EN: The sudden news came as a complete shock.
Example_CN: 这个突然的消息令人完全震惊。

Example_EN: This sofa is so comfortable that I almost fell asleep.
Example_CN: 这张沙发太舒服了，我差点睡着。

Example_EN: He took the usual bus to school this morning.
Example_CN: 今天早上他坐惯常那班公交去学校。

Example_EN: Please read the instructions carefully before you begin.
Example_CN: 开始前请仔细阅读说明。

Example_EN: I need to pack my suitcase for tomorrow's trip.
Example_CN: 我需要为明天的旅行收拾行李箱。

Example_EN: I cannot recall the name of the restaurant.
Example_CN: 我想不起那家餐馆的名字了。

Example_EN: They ordered a bottle of red wine with dinner.
Example_CN: 他们晚餐点了一瓶红酒。

Example_EN: She packed a camera to take photos on holiday.
Example_CN: 她带了相机去假日拍照。

Collocation: go for a swim;swim across;swim lessons
Example_EN: Children learn to swim in the school pool each summer.
Example_CN: 孩子们每年夏天在学校泳池学游泳。

Example_EN: This factory manufactures electric bikes for export.
Example_CN: 这家工厂生产出口用的电动自行车。
MemoryTip: manu（手）+ facture：手工/机器做成产品。

Collocation: movie theater;go to the theater;theater ticket
Example_EN: We saw a new play at the local theater last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚我们在当地剧院看了一出新戏。
MemoryTip: 美式 theater＝英式 theatre：看戏/看电影的地方。

Example_EN: She cycles to work when the weather is fine.
Example_CN: 天气好时她骑自行车上班。

Example_EN: He drinks a cup of coffee every morning before work.
Example_CN: 他每天上班前喝一杯咖啡。

Example_EN: I totally agree with your suggestion.
Example_CN: 我完全同意你的建议。

Example_EN: The science museum is free for students on Sundays.
Example_CN: 科学博物馆周日对学生免费开放。
MemoryTip: museum：收藏并展示历史与文化之物。

Example_EN: Visitors must leave large bags at the entrance.
Example_CN: 访客须把大包留在入口处。

Collocation: freedom of speech;personal freedom;fight for freedom
Example_EN: Freedom of speech is an important right in many countries.
Example_CN: 言论自由在许多国家是一项重要权利。

Example_EN: The new bridge is still under construction.
Example_CN: 这座新桥仍在建设中。

Example_EN: Dear friends, thank you for coming tonight.
Example_CN: 亲爱的朋友们，谢谢你们今晚前来。
MemoryTip: dear：写信抬头的称呼，也可指贵。

Example_EN: Our main objective is to improve student reading skills.
Example_CN: 我们的主要目标是提高学生阅读能力。
MemoryTip: object → objective：对准的目标；也指不夹私情。
